verse.name: v1
verse.lines: On Christ alone, our Chief Cornerstone, No other foundation can we build upon Not philosophy nor the wisdom of man All other ground is sinking sand

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Upon this rock, You build Your Church And the gates of hell will not prevail When we bind and loose, we proclaim Your truth And in Jesus' name, we will not fail Never fail, oh-oh-oh-oh Oh, He's building a church now, now, now.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Crucified, raised up from the dead, Led captivity captive, it is finished, Oh, He gave us the keys, His authority, Now we are joint heirs to the praise of His glory, glory.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Upon this rock, You build Your Church And the gates of hell will not prevail (no, no) When we bind and loose, we proclaim Your truth, And in Jesus' name, we will not fail, We'll never fail, no!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We will never fail, we will never fail We will never fail, no, we will never fail We will never fail, no, we will never fail, no We will never fail, no, we will never fail We will never fail (we will never fail) We will never fail (we will never fail) We will never fail (we will never fail) No, we will never fail (we will never fail) We will never fail, no, no, no-no

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Build Your Church Build Your Church Build it from the ground up It's Your Church Build Your Church Build Your Church Build it from the ground up We're Your Church

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Build Your Church (build Your Church) Build Your Church Build it from the ground up (It's Your Church) oh, build Your Church (Build Your Church) Oh, Jesus (build Your Church) Build it from the ground up (build it from the ground up) We're Your Church (we're Your Church)

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Build Your Church (build Your Church) Build Your Church (build Your Church) Build it from the ground up (build it from the ground up) It's Your Church (it's Your Church) Build Your Church, Jesus (build Your Church) Build Your Church, Jesus (build Your Church) Build Your Church (build it from the ground up) Upon this rock

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Upon this rock, You build Your Church (You will build Your Church) And the gates of hell (the gates of hell) will not prevail When we bind and loose (we bind and loose) We proclaim Your truth (we proclaim Your truth) yeah And in Jesus' Name (Jesus' name) precious name of Jesus we will not fail (oh) Jesus, build Your Church

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Build it from the ground (build it from the ground up) Oh, it's Your Church Build Your Church (Build Your Church) Build it from the ground up (build it from the ground up) 'Cause we're Your Church (we're Your Church)

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Build Your Church (build Your Church) Build Your Church (build Your Church) Build it from the ground up (build it from the ground up) It's Your Church (it's Your Church) Build Your Church (build Your Church) Build Your Church (build Your Church) Build it from the ground (build it from the ground up) We're Your Church (we're Your Church)

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Build Your Church (build Your Church) Build Your Church (build Your Church) Build it from the ground up (build it from the ground up) Build it from the ground up (it's Your Church) Build Your Church (build Your Church) (Build Your Church) (Build it from the ground up) (We're Your Church)

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: Build Your Church (oh, oh, oh) (Oh, oh, oh) (Oh, oh, oh-oh-oh) I've got confidence (Oh, oh, oh) (Oh, oh, oh) (Oh, oh, oh-oh-oh) the name of the Lord is strong

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: and mighty (Oh, oh, oh) (Oh, oh, oh-oh-oh) we have confidence (Oh, oh, oh) (Oh, oh, oh) (Oh, oh, oh-oh-oh) we're going out to the nations

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: we're going out to the nations (Oh, oh, oh) (Oh, oh, oh) (Oh, oh, oh-oh-oh) 'cause it's bigger than us, oh

verse.name: v16
verse.lines: 'Cause it's bigger than us, oh How beautiful are the feet Of they that carry the gospel? How beautiful are the feet Of they that carry the gospel? How beautiful are the feet Of they that carry the gospel? How beautiful are the feet?

verse.name: v17
verse.lines: Keep walking, keep walking Keep preaching, keep teaching Keep walking, keep walking Keep preaching, keep teaching

verse.name: v18
verse.lines: Oh, the gates of hell will not prevail No, the gates of hell will not prevail No, the gates of hell will not prevail No, the gates of hell will not prevail, oh

verse.name: v19
verse.lines: Keep walking, keep walking Keep preaching, keep teaching No, the gates of hell will not prevail No, the gates of hell will not prevail

verse.name: v20
verse.lines: Oh (no, the gates of hell will not prevail), keep walking, keep walking (No, the gates of hell will not prevail) keep preaching, keep teaching No, the gates of hell will not prevail, no No, the gates of hell will not prevail, no No, the gates of hell will not prevail No, the gates of hell will not No, the gates of hell will not prevail (no, the gates of hell will not prevail) No, no (no, the gates of hell will not prevail)
